name: worker-functions
description: Enlite Health Platform - Worker Cloud Functions

scripts.dev:local: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d postgres api
scripts.test:e2e:stack:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml -f docker-compose.firebase.yml up -d postgres firebase-emulator api
scripts.test:e2e:stack:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml -f docker-compose.firebase.yml down
scripts.test:e2e:full: npm run test:e2e:stack:up && USE_FIREBASE_EMULATOR=true FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:9099 DATABASE_URL=postgresql://enlite_admin:enlite_password@localhost:5433/enlite_e2e npm run test:e2e; npm run test:e2e:stack:down
scripts.test:e2e:docker: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d postgres api && node scripts/wait-for-health.js && npm run test:e2e; docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml down
scripts.test:e2e:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d postgres api && node scripts/wait-for-health.js

author: Enlite Health
